Thanks for meeting me, Zilaudio. I would like to buy your soybeans, but my offer is a little lower than your price.
Thank you, Diana. I want to make a deal, but I could not accept that price. Could we agree on a little more?
I understand. Would you consider a longer contract if I raise the offer?
Yes, I would. A longer contract works for me, but only on good terms. My partner and I need clear conditions.
Of course. What condition is most important for you?
Payment within a week after delivery. That is the one condition I cannot change.
That is fair. So, between us: a higher price, a longer contract, and payment within a week. Do we have a deal?
We have a deal. Send me the contract, and I will sign it today.
Could we agree on a better price?
I would accept a longer contract.
Send me the contract and I will sign it.
I have one condition: payment within a week.
We have a deal.

Hi Zilaudio, this is Diana. I am calling about our deal. I talked to my team, and we can raise our offer a little. Here are the terms: we would pay a higher price, but we need a longer contract, twelve months instead of six. And we would like the payment within two weeks, not one week. If you agree, I will send the contract this week, and you can sign it. Please think about it and call me back. I really want to work with you, and I think this is a good deal for both of us. Thank you, and talk soon.

Hi, this is Zilaudio, with some good news. We closed the deal with Diana this morning. We agreed on a good price, and the contract is for twelve months. The terms are clear: we deliver the soybeans, and they pay within two weeks. I signed the contract, and Diana signed it too, so everything is official. Diana is a good partner, and this is a strong deal for us and for the farm. I will send you a copy of the contract today. Thank you for all your help. Talk soon.
